skills.name: Attack
skills.description: A basic physical attack. Fastest free action.

skills.name: Quick Hit
skills.description: A swift, precise strike that hits hard and advances your next turn dramatically. Costs MP.

skills.name: Smash
skills.description: A powerful slam dealing heavy physical damage. Slower next turn.

skills.name: Bio Drain
skills.description: Drains HP from the target to restore own HP. Slightly slower next turn.

skills.name: Blaze
skills.description: A burst of searing flame. Fire-elemental. Slightly slower next turn.

skills.name: Blazra
skills.description: A roaring column of fire. Strong fire-elemental. Slower next turn.

skills.name: Blazaga
skills.description: An inferno of pure flame. Powerful fire-elemental. Much slower next turn.

skills.name: Frost
skills.description: A shard of biting ice. Ice-elemental. Slightly slower next turn.

skills.name: Frostra
skills.description: A storm of razor ice crystals. Strong ice-elemental. Slower next turn.

skills.name: Frostaga
skills.description: A glacial freeze that shatters foes. Powerful ice-elemental. Much slower next turn.

skills.name: Spark
skills.description: A crackling bolt of electricity. Lightning-elemental. Slightly slower next turn.

skills.name: Sparkra
skills.description: A raging lightning storm. Strong lightning-elemental. Slower next turn.

skills.name: Sparkaga
skills.description: A massive thunderstrike from above. Powerful lightning-elemental. Much slower next turn.

skills.name: Surge
skills.description: A surging wave of water. Water-elemental. Slightly slower next turn.

skills.name: Surgera
skills.description: A crashing torrent of water. Strong water-elemental. Slower next turn.

skills.name: Surgega
skills.description: A devastating flood. Powerful water-elemental. Much slower next turn.

skills.name: Cure
skills.description: Restores a small amount of HP to one ally.

skills.name: Cura
skills.description: Restores a moderate amount of HP to one ally. Slightly slower next turn.

skills.name: Curaga
skills.description: Restores a large amount of HP to one ally. Slower next turn.

skills.name: Esuna
skills.description: Removes all status ailments from one ally.

skills.name: Raise
skills.description: Revives a KO'd ally with 50% of their max HP. Slightly slower next turn.

skills.name: Auto-Life
skills.description: Grants Auto-Life; target revives automatically with 1 HP once. Slightly slower next turn.

skills.name: Ground Slam
skills.description: Slams the ground with crushing force, dealing physical damage to all enemies. Much slower next turn.

skills.name: Pray
skills.description: A heartfelt prayer that restores a moderate amount of HP to the entire party. Slower next turn.

skills.name: Mend
skills.description: Enemy heals itself.

skills.name: Haste Bell
skills.description: Rings a bell that doubles one ally's speed. Slightly slower next turn.

skills.name: Slow Bell
skills.description: Rings a bell that halves one enemy's speed. Slightly slower next turn.

skills.name: Venom Strike
skills.description: Injects venom into a single target, inflicting Poison.

skills.name: Dispel
skills.description: Removes ALL status effects (both buffs and debuffs) from one target.

skills.name: Corpse Dust
skills.description: Curses a foe with Zombie, reversing all healing into damage. Slightly slower next turn.

skills.name: Mirror Shell
skills.description: Wraps an ally in a magical shell that reflects incoming spells. Slightly slower next turn.

skills.name: Shell Ward
skills.description: Enemy casts a reflect barrier on itself.
